description_long: This is a lifelike model of a Golden Retriever dog, depicted in a standing posture with its head slightly turned to the left. The fur texture is detailed, with a gradient of colors ranging from a creamy yellow on the head and legs to a rich golden brown along the back and tail. The dog's facial features are well-defined, including a prominent black nose, dark eyes, and floppy ears that hang down beside its head. The body is robust and muscular, with a bushy tail that hangs naturally downward. The surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture, simulating the look of real fur. There are no visible accessories such as a collar or leash, and the model is solid with no openings or receptacle features.
description: A realistic standing Golden Retriever model with detailed fur texture, creamy yellow to golden brown coloring, and floppy ears. The dog has a natural, lifelike posture and a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the dog's face, chest, and front legs, with the head turned slightly to the left and both floppy ears visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dog's profile, muscular body, and the full length of the tail, with the head facing away.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and tail, with both hind legs visible and the tail hanging down.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the dog's profile from the opposite side, with the head facing right and the right ear clearly visible.
